---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks or housekeeping items
title: '[MAINTENANCE] '
labels: 'maintenance'
assignees: ''

---

**Maintenance Type**
- [ ] Code cleanup
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance improvements
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

**Tasks to Complete**
List the specific tasks that need to be completed as part of this maintenance work.

**Impact Assessment**
- [ ] Low impact - No breaking changes
- [ ] Medium impact - Minor breaking changes
- [ ] High impact - Major breaking changes

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
